name: Ruins Entrance
description: A cracked stairway descends beneath a broken arch wrapped in cold mist.

name: Collapsed Hall
description: A fractured corridor where damp stone and broken pillars swallow the torchlight.

name: Trap Chamber
description: Dust-covered tiles and old rune grooves hint that the room still remembers its purpose.

name: Buried Sanctum
description: A silent chamber shelters a sealed altar beneath layers of ash and age.
